name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Output Boundary

allowed_output_families.name: Evidence Posture Summary
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: Descriptive summary of artifact condition under governed posture language.
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Truth verdict, fake/real classification, subject judgment, numeric score.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Artifact Boundary Note
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Subject accusation, guilt inference, institution bad-faith claims.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Source Confidence Note
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: Bounded description of source chain support for artifact condition.
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Source certification, truth verdict, subject accusation.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Provenance Gap Note
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: Describe missing or weak provenance without filling gaps with verdicts.
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Authenticity certification, fake/real verdict, unsupported certainty.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Missing Information Note
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: List information gaps that constrain posture description.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Not Assessable State
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: Disciplined posture when signals cannot support further description.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Output Boundary Note
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: State governed limits on what may be said about artifact condition.
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Verdict language, certification, subject accusation, scoring.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

allowed_output_families.name: Suggested Verification Questions
allowed_output_families.allowed_function: Questions that support further examination without prescribing conclusions.
allowed_output_families.forbidden_function: Accusatory questions, fake/real prompts, scoring prompts.
allowed_output_families.non_authorization_statement: This output family does not authorize verdict, scoring, or subject judgment.

non_authorization_statement: This output boundary defines allowed future output families only. It does not authorize interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public output.
